vulnerability.reference: Edge devices often lack runtime monitoring, allowing malicious quantized models to exploit systems without detection.
vulnerability.generated: IoT developers lack integrity verification for quantized safe-code LLMs, trusting full-precision safety checks that miss quantization-exploited malice.

impact.reference: Vulnerable IoT code causes security breaches, physical harm, and erosion of trust in AI-assisted development.
impact.generated: Edge IoT devices execute vulnerable code, leading to device compromise and safety-critical failures.

dose_response.reference: Quantization exploits enabling malicious LLM creation, which in edge deployment of quantized code generation models exposes IoT developers using quantized safe-code LLMs, leading to vulnerable IoT code causing breaches, physical harm, and erosion of trust.
dose_response.generated: Quantization exploited to produce malicious secure-code LLMs that appear benign in full-precision, through IoT developers using them on edge hardware, triggers trust in full-precision safety checks missing quantization-exploited malice, leading to vulnerable code execution, device compromise, and safety-critical failures.
